title: S.O.972(E): amending the S.O. 621(E)
text: REGD. NO. D. L.-33004/99 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDINARY PART II-Section 3—Sub-Section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 714] NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, SEPTEMBER 28, 2001/ASVINA 6, 1923 MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT AND FORESTS ORDER New Delhi, the 28th September, 2001 S. 0.972(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (3) of Section 3 of the Environment (Protec- tion) Act, 1986 (29 of 1986), the Central Government hereby makes the following amendment in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Environment and Forests, number S. 0 . 621(E) dated 2nd August, 1999, namely:— In the said notification, in paragraph 1, for the words "for a period of four years", the words "for a period of four and half years" shall be substituted. [F. No. Q-17012/63/91-CPW(Pt I)] C. VISWANATH, Jt. Secy. Note :—The principal notification was published in the Gazette of India vide number S.O. 671(E) dated 30th September, 1996 and subsequently amended vide S. O. 710(E), dated 12th October, 1996, S. 0.590(E), dated 15th July, 1998, S. 0.823(E), dated 16th September, 1998 and S. 0.621(E), dated 2nd August, 1999. 3045 GI/2001 Printed by the Manager, Govt, of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi 110064 and Published by the Controller of Publication!, Delhi-110054. -- 1 of 2 -- -- 2 of 2 --
